name: canto-de-barro
description: A fully playable Mexican-inspired browser voxel sandbox.

scripts.test: node tests/world.test.mjs && node tests/player-physics.test.mjs && node tests/static.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check src/world.js && node --check src/game.js && node --check src/player-physics.js && node --check src/player-controller.js && node --check sw.js && npm test
